title: ROSAUI Cat Teaser Wand Toys Set – 2 Extendable Rods with 5 Attachments (3x Feathers & 2x Birds), Wooden Handle, 107cm Retractable Interactive Cat Toy for Indoor Cats Kittens Play, Exercise & Bonding
features: 【Complete 2-Rod Set with 5 Lifelike Attachments】Includes 2 durable teaser wands, 3 feather attachments and 2 bird toys. Switch easily with the clip-on elastic cords to keep your cat engaged every day.
【Extendable to 107cm for Safe Indoor Play】Three-section telescopic design allows for long-distance play without scratching. Fully retractable for compact storage after playtime.

【Eco-Friendly Wooden Handle – Comfortable Grip】Crafted from natural wood, the smooth handle fits comfortably in hand for prolonged play sessions. Sturdy and sustainable choice for eco-conscious cat owners.
【Great for Exercise, Stress Relief & Bonding】Ideal for reducing boredom and supporting a healthy lifestyle. Strengthens the bond between pet and owner while encouraging natural hunting instincts.

【Safe & Fun for All Cats and Families】Whether you’ve got kittens or senior cats, this set offers gentle interaction for all ages. Perfect for households with multiple cats or kids who love to join in.
Note: Avoid swinging the cat toy rod forcefully to prevent it from getting stuck and being unable to retract.

specifications_table.Special features: ‎Eco-friendly Wooden Handle, High Strength 3-Section Extendable Wands, Maximum Length 107cm
